findings.evidence: Lines 53-54 define `IsRegular p` as `Function.Surjective p ∧ ∀ b, ...`; lines 145-148 build `deckEquivFiber` only from `orbitMap_injective hp e` and `hreg.orbitMap_surjective e`, and `orbitMap_surjective` at lines 99-102 only uses transitivity of the fibre containing `e`.
findings.fix: Prove a local version first, e.g. taking `[MulAction.IsPretransitive (Deck p) (p ⁻¹' {b})]` or `Function.Surjective (fun φ : Deck p => φ • e)`, and derive the `IsRegular` wrapper from it.
findings.issue: `deckEquivFiber` requires `hreg : IsRegular p`, which includes surjectivity of `p` and transitivity on every fibre, although the equivalence at the chosen `e : p ⁻¹' {b}` only uses pretransitivity of that one fibre.

summary: The regularity predicate itself is at the expected fibre-transitivity level, but the main evaluation equivalence is stated too globally for its proof and downstream API.
